content_hints.description: Grand facades of pale stone, stained dark by decades of electroplasmic smog, creak under the weight of hurried footsteps. A distant engine hum blends with the clatter of metal, hinting at unseen movement, as students shuffle past, their leather satchels brimming

npcs.name: Lysara
npcs.dialogue:
[Enthusiastically] Quest Giver, I say: You speak with a tone that seems to resonate with me as well; perhaps we can find common ground.

Tales and tricks of the trade | The Docks | "I've seen many adventures on this fair sea," said the Pirate. He waved at his fleet, gazing over the horizon like a sailor's eyes in an endless blue expanse."

event_triggers: The fixer, a skilled artisan, stands ready with a sledgehammer, his eyes on the distant workshop where new tools are being assembled in an hour of constant labor.

content_hints.description: The university bell tower looms through fog, its clock face glowing an unearthly blue.
content_hints.read_aloud: The bell tower rises through the fog like a finger pointing at nothing. Its clock face glows a faint, sickly blue -- electroplasmic, not gaslight. The hour it shows doesn't match any clock you've seen tonight. Something about this part of the city keeps its own time.
